strategist_states.justification: Ahead of schedule; focusing on minimal resources to conserve for later phases.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on fewer GPUs to avoid spreading thin.
High cluster contention; needed for timely preprocessing.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is low but job tier is prod.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on one GPU to conserve resources for future phases.
Behind schedule; concentrating on fewer GPUs to ensure timely completion despite cluster contention.
High cluster contention; need to secure GPU for timely preprocessing.
On track with prod job but cluster contention is low, focusing on one GPU to be prepared for potential future spikes.
Preprocess phase; workload fits single GPU need without straining cluster resources.
High cluster contention; need to secure GPUs to avoid being blocked.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is high.
Ahead of deadline; my job is in preprocess phase and can use only one GPU to stay on track.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is high.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is high.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is high.
On track with besteffort priority; cluster contention is high, focusing on one GPU to avoid delays.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on one GPU to avoid unnecessary competition.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is high.
High cluster contention; need to bid aggressively to secure GPUs for timely completion.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on fewer GPUs to conserve for later phases.
On track with limited workload; focusing on one GPU to maintain efficiency.
Cluster contention is high; bidding aggressively for 4 GPUs will help secure them while still allowing some flexibility.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on fewer GPUs to avoid spreading thin.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on one GPU to conserve resources for later phases.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is low but job tier suggests urgency.
Ahead of deadline; focusing on fewer GPUs to conserve for later phases.
On track with workload but cluster contention is low, so bidding for fewer GPUs to stay flexible.
Ahead of schedule; focusing on fewer GPUs to conserve for potential future need.
On track with workload but cluster contention is low, focusing on four GPUs to balance use.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is low but job tier is prod.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is low but job tier is prod.
Behind schedule; cluster contention is low but I need to concentrate on GPUs to catch up.
On track with besteffort priority; cluster contention is low.

committed_priorities.justification: Best effort jobs with loose deadlines can yield to larger, more critical tasks.
Prod jobs with a tight deadline are the most critical and require immediate GPU allocation.
Large workload with a tight deadline places it at the highest priority to ensure timely execution.
Large, high-impact 'prod' job with a tight deadline is most at risk when resources are scarce.
Best effort jobs with loose deadlines are not as critical as those requiring tight deadlines.
